title: loncomelos arcuatum
intro: Loncomelos arcuatum, also known as Chrysolaena arcuatum, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family that is native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Loncomelos arcuatum is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its essential oils are extracted for further use in medicine and aromatherapy.
